payload: In IDEAS.md and VISION.md you can find the next possible micro research that we want to execute. Please use nodebooklm to research about any specific ideas and use your subagents in a full loop with 1-2 adversarial reviews after you've finished your work so you can add the reviewers changes

Exp 6 (loudness_fix): Loudness hypothesis FALSIFIED. Scalar cal learns scales ~0.99 (magnitudes already matched). RMSNorm catastrophically harmful (+22.4%). Matched-magnitude fails (+7.3%). Real cause: function-space gap. Weight averaging is best zero-shot (+1.5% vs joint). All 6 relu_router review fixes addressed. Adversarial review: PROCEED.

Exp 8 (capsule_dedup): KILLED - only 1.9% redundancy at cos>0.95. Shared knowledge is distributed not concentrated (reconciles 54% Procrustes with 1.9% neuron-level sharing). 60% dead capsules found - real compression opportunity. Weight averaging validated as distributed-sharing mechanism. 3 new questions added: dead capsule pruning, behavioral dedup, training-time compatibility. Adversarial review: PROCEED.

Exp 9 (dead_capsule_pruning): PASSED - 57% dead capsules, 37% param reduction, zero quality loss. Prune-then-calibrate: -1.1% vs joint. Order-independent with calibration. Layer 0 special (0.4% dead vs 73-82% in layers 1-3). 92% dead on both domains = training-induced death dominates. Adversarial review: PROCEED with 5 advisory notes for macro.

Exp 9 (dead_capsule_pruning) integrated. PROCEED verdict from 2nd adversarial review. VISION.md updated with 3 new research questions (13-15): pre-composition death rates, random pruning baseline, non-ReLU approximate pruning. FINDINGS.md updated with review advisory. Memories added.

Exp 10 (pruning_controls): 2/3 kill criteria triggered. Single-domain death 54.3% (general ReLU, not composition-specific). Composition-induced death only 7.7%. Targeted pruning still matters (random has high variance). MATH.md Assumption 6 from Exp 9 revised. Artifacts at micro/models/pruning_controls/

Exp 10 (pruning_controls): PROCEED verdict. Dead capsule pruning is general ReLU (87% training-induced). VISION.md, FINDINGS.md, memories updated. New questions: capsule identity tracking (Exp 16), training duration vs death rate (Exp 17).

Exp 17 (training_duration): Death is non-monotonic (spike to 55% at S=100, slow decay to 47% by S=3200). 1/3 kill criteria triggered (monotonicity falsified). Pruning opportunity persists at 40-50%. Two adversarial reviews: PROCEED. Advisory fixes applied (exponential fit caveated, nested seed noted, decoupled claim revised, Layer 0 explained by fixed input dist, constant-LR limitation added).

Exp 17 (training_duration): 3rd adversarial review PROCEED. Integrated to VISION.md, FINDINGS.md, memories. Added 3 new research directions: per-capsule revival tracking (Exp 18), LR schedule impact on death trajectory (Exp 19), death recovery mechanism isolation (Exp 20).

Exp 18 (capsule_revival): Per-capsule revival tracking complete. Turnover hypothesis FALSIFIED - true revival dominates (28% revive, Jaccard=0.669). Revival accelerates over training. Practical implication: prune AFTER training completes, not during.
Exp 18 (capsule_revival) reviewed PROCEED and integrated. Added 3 new research Qs: profiling noise, revival under composition, revival endpoint.

Exp profiling_noise: profiling noise negligible (2.6-3.8% disagreement), Exp 18 revival validated. Two adversarial reviews both PROCEED; second found consensus bias and binomial model issues needing paper revision.
Exp 12 profiling_noise integrated: VISION.md updated (proven + 2 new questions), FINDINGS.md appended, 3 memories added. 14 micro experiments complete.

Exp 19 lr_schedule_death: 0/3 kill criteria triggered. Warmup eliminates 74% of death spike (13.2% vs 51.6%). Cosine doubles revival. Warmup+cosine equilibrium death 19.6% (vs 47.3% constant). Macro pruning yield revised to ~20% dead. All artifacts in micro/models/lr_schedule_death/

Exp 19 lr_schedule_death: PROCEED. Warmup+cosine revises macro death from 47% to 20%. VISION.md, FINDINGS.md, memories updated. 3 new research questions added (warmup fraction sensitivity, Adam momentum interaction, cosine revival mechanism).

Exp 20 warmup_sweep: PROCEED (2 adversarial reviews). R=Sw/Tspike predicts death suppression within 1pp. 1% warmup=31% benefit, 5%+ needed for 20% dead prediction. Key reviewer finding: macro extrapolation must use absolute steps not fraction (Chinchilla 0.33%=R=100, strong suppression). New research Qs: step-function warmup test, T_spike dependence on warmup.

Exp 20 warmup_sweep integrated. VISION.md updated (warmup-dependent death rates, 3 new Qs: step-function warmup, T_spike dependence on warmup, T_spike at macro). FINDINGS.md appended. Memories added (warmup-fraction-sensitivity, macro-warmup-steps-not-fraction, cumulative-lr-integral-model).

max_runtime
